result: Built comprehensive onboarding and help center features: (1) Help Center page at /support with 5-step quickstart guide and 8 collapsible how-to articles covering GHL connection, task creation, templates, SOP training, scheduling, execution history, workflows, and browser sessions. (2) Floating help button in DashboardLayout that opens the HelpDrawer for contextual assistance from any page. (3) PageEmptyState components integrated into ScheduledTasks page with CTAs guiding users to create their first task. (4) Updated DashboardHome with a visual 3-step quickstart card (Connect GHL -> Upload Training Docs -> Run First Task) linking to the Help Center. (5) Support sidebar link added. Note: The existing OnboardingWizard (6-step flow with GHL connect, brand setup, integrations) was already wired into App.tsx for first-login users. The HelpDrawer was pre-existing but unwired - now connected via floating button.
